scripts.check:node: node -e "const major=Number(process.versions.node.split('.')[0]); if(major!==24){console.error('Bliver requires Node.js 24.x; found '+process.version); process.exit(1)}"
scripts.render-build: npm run check:node && npm run release:v2:verify-sha && npm run build:v2 && npm run release:v2:verify-candidate
scripts.dev:v2: npm run build:runtime-packages && concurrently -n web,api -c blue,green "npm run dev --workspace @bliver/web" "npm run dev --workspace @bliver/api"
scripts.build:runtime-packages: npm run build --workspace @bliver/domain && npm run build --workspace @bliver/contracts && npm run build --workspace @bliver/ui
scripts.build:v2:apps: npm run build --workspace @bliver/api && npm run build --workspace @bliver/web
scripts.build:v2: npm run build:runtime-packages && npm run build:v2:apps
scripts.phase7:gates: npm run verify:v2-foundation && npx playwright test && npm run perf:v2:browser-evidence && npm run build --workspace @bliver/web && npm run lighthouse:v2 && npm run perf:v2 && npm run security:v2 && npm run cap:v2:smoke
scripts.release:v2:predeploy: npm run release:v2:verify-candidate && npm run db:v2:migrate
scripts.verify:v2-foundation: npm run build:runtime-packages && npm run architecture:check && npm run lint:v2 && npm run typecheck:v2 && npm run test:v2 && npm run build:v2:apps
